note: Discovery only. Ideas + which primary sources to chase. Write original from primary sources; never republish.

leads.title: NYC Is First US City to Adopt Click-to-Cancel Rule, Targeting Gym Memberships
leads.summary: New rules cracking down on junk fees and shady subscription practices put in place by the Mamdani Administration will affect fitness facilities operating in New York City.

leads.title: ATN Week in Review: The Soft Fitness Era Is Here
leads.summary: As wellness becomes a bigger priority, consumers are gravitating toward longevity and community-based fitness over hardcore workouts.

leads.title: PureGym to Open in Ireland, Citing Growing Market
leads.summary: As participation in weekly exercise rises in Ireland, PureGym, the U.K.'s largest low-price gym operator, is entering the market.

leads.title: Ultimate Longevity Center Sells 200 Franchise Territories Ahead of First Openings
leads.summary: The Anthony Geisler and Gary Brecka-backed concept is seeing strong franchise demand ahead of its first openings, which are slated for the coming months.

leads.title: ATN Insights: Driving Revenue With Movement Assessments
leads.summary: Not only can a personalized movement health score pinpoint areas for client improvement, it also creates an opportunity for gyms to grow their business.

leads.title: Sebastien Lagree Alleges Florida Studio Swapped Megaformers for Alibaba Knockoffs
leads.summary: The Lagree Fitness founder has sued St. Petersburg's Studio Physique, alleging the studio swapped patented Megaformers for knockoff versions.

leads.title: Why Most Fitness Brands Don’t See a Return on Their AI Investment
leads.summary: When it comes to long-term success, 95% of AI projects fail, but don't blame the technology, says PerfectGym's Karl Foster.

leads.title: ETS Performance Tops 80 Locations as Youth Fitness Market Booms
leads.summary: ETS Performance is continuing its national expansion, opening 16 locations during the first half of 2026 as demand for youth fitness and athletic development programs continues to grow.

leads.title: ACE CEO Cedric X. Bryant to Be Inducted Into National Fitness Hall of Fame
leads.summary: Bryant is being recognized for advancing evidence-based fitness, professional education and the integration of exercise into healthcare.

leads.title: Interactive Strength to Acquire Connected Stair Climbing Brand Stepr
leads.summary: Interactive Strength is acquiring Stepr, adding the connected stair climbing brand to a portfolio that includes Wattbike, Clmbr and Ergatta.

leads.title: Investors Tip Pilates, Low-Price Gyms for Continued Growth
leads.summary: Unsurprisingly, investors remain excited about the fitness industry's two highest-growth sectors, citing rising customer demand and strong value propositions.

leads.title: Echelon Explains Why Connected Strength is the Future
leads.summary: Despite the strength boom currently sweeping across gyms and studios, Echelon Fitness, a leading fitness equipment supplier, says the industry needs to take a different approach when it comes to delivering what consumers and operators need from the modality.

leads.title: The Pilates Craze Comes for Luxury Real Estate
leads.summary: The new wellness buyer is a woman, and she has South Florida developers trading oversized gyms for reformer Pilates rooms and intentional movement spaces.

leads.title: Accountability Beats Motivation in Delivering Fitness Results, Data Shows
leads.summary: Data from 125,000 Orangetheory and Anytime Fitness challenge participants reveals the power of accountability, plus other surprising findings.

leads.title: NBA Players Sign Virtual Healthcare Deal in Latest Wellness Push
leads.summary: The National Basketball Players Association (NBPA) has inked a deal with Teladoc Health to expand player healthcare offerings.

leads.title: Lenders to Planet Fitness Operator in Talks to Take Ownership
leads.summary: The American Securities-owned fitness operator and its creditors have been engaged in restructuring talks to tackle a rapid succession of debt maturities.

leads.title: Playlist Launches ‘AI Concierge,’ Plans More Artificial Intelligence Products
leads.summary: Playlist's new front desk assistant automates bookings and client communications as software providers race to embed AI into gym operations.

leads.title: How Fitness Brands like Barry’s Capitalize on Employer Wellness Investment

leads.title: Peloton Prioritizes Low-Impact Strength Training
leads.summary: Peloton’s new HiLit+ program comes as the brand leans further into sustainable training and longevity-focused protocols.

leads.title: City Fitness Heads to Hoboken in First Expansion Outside Philadelphia
leads.summary: City Fitness will open two Hoboken clubs this year as gyms increasingly eye New Jersey as a competitive market.
